title: Reforgery
description: An experimental datapack that adds weapons of mass destruction such as orbital strikes, black holes, the death note and more...
body:
_“Now I am become Death, the destroyer of worlds.” - J. Robert Oppenheimer_

Reforgery is a powerful experimental weaponry datapack that adds serveral weapons and objects of mass destruction, utilise at your own peril for many effects will cause longlasting or in some cases irreparable damage.

Weapons:

**Void Piercer:**
A gun that does a quick little windup then shoots a bolt that kills anything it touches.

**Banblade:**
Once touched by the Banblade, your death is guaranteed. 

**Orbital Strike:**
Blow up anyone, anywhere, opens a ui allowing you to call a coordinate based orbital strike.

**The Death Note:**
Enter a specific type of entity, then their name, and they will die no matter the distance.

**Collapsing Neutron Star:**
A neutron star on the verge of collapse, pull it apart to create a black hole.


completely survival friendly... 

[banblade short](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/PzOthl--HsU)
banblade inspired by [Charter](https://modrinth.com/mod/charter)
